title: ErrorReport
description: Any module failure publishes one of these. The Conductor displays them and instructs affected renderers to fall back gracefully. Engine failures appear in Window 3 like any other audit anomaly.

module_id.description: Which module is reporting the error.

severity.description: info = informational; warning = degraded function; error = this module failed; fatal = app cannot continue.

related_request_id.description: If the error was triggered by a specific request.

user_facing_text.description: What the user sees in place of the missing content.

user_actionable.description: Is there something the user can do? If true, the message should explain what.

suggested_session_prompt.description: If this represents a bug, a draft prompt for the next AI session to fix it. Embeds the project's session-handoff discipline directly in the error system.
